---
title: "Sir Andrew Agnew 8th Bt."
---

## Sir Andrew Agnew 8th Bt.

**Dates:** (1818-1892)

### Description

landowner

### Biography

Briefly engaged to the Hon. Jane Colborne in 1845, he later married (20 August 1846) Lady Louisa Noel (d.1883). [PB]

### Letters

- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
